commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is appropriate while this active external PR mainly needs contributor real behavior proof and a small security-review follow-up rather than an automated replacement PR.; Needs attention: The diff has no dependency, workflow, or persistence expansion, but the in-memory failure fingerprint should not retain raw OAuth token material.; Review finding: [P3] Avoid retaining OAuth secrets in failure fingerpr... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an OAuth manager terminal refresh-failure cache keyed by credential state, threads forced OAuth refresh through Codex app-server auth, and adds regression tests for cached failures and forced-refresh errors.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection of current main shows the expired/forced OAuth paths can call refresh again on each resolution without a terminal failure cache, and the PR adds targeted regression coverage for that path.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is appropriate while this active external PR mainly needs contributor real behavior proof and a small security-review follow-up rather than an automated replacement PR.
